name: vinary-viewer
description: Enhancements that turn the vmd Markdown previewer into a full reading environment: a git file-tree sidebar, Files/Contents tabs with a scroll-spy table of contents, an in-page find bar, automatic SVG figure font-matching, a dedicated image view, history navigation (keyboard + mouse thumb buttons), a file-search filter, and named color themes (Spacemacs dark/light).
author: Vinary Tree
